name: Lemon Poppy Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bread machine or bowl, mix together water, flour, dry milk, salt, butter, lemon yogurt, honey, toasted and sliced almonds, lemon peel, poppy seeds, and yeast.
3. Add the mixture to your bread machine as directed for your model.
4. Bake until golden brown and the internal temperature reaches 190°F (88°C).
